results.description: Use automated discovery tools: capture live traffic, scan repositories and configs, analyze gateway logs, and trace runtime behavior. These methods surface shadow and zombie APIs faster than manual reviews.

results.description: DAST (Dynamic Application Security Testing): Test running APIs like an attacker would, identifying runtime vulnerabilities like authentication bypasses, injection flaws, and misconfigurations. SAST (Static Application Security Testing): Scan source code without running it to find security issues like hardcoded credentials, unsafe functions, and vulnerable patterns. SCA (Software Composition Analysis): Check dependencies for known vulnerabilities (covered in Practice #8).
